description_long: This object is a classic shotgun with a long, slender barrel and a wooden full stock. The barrel appears to be made of blued or darkened metal, extending in a straight line from the receiver to the muzzle, with a simple front sight post visible. The receiver is compact and metallic, with a bolt handle protruding from the right side, indicating a bolt-action mechanism. The wooden stock is smoothly contoured, with a rich brown finish and a slightly curved butt for shoulder support. The trigger guard is rounded and metallic, enclosing a single trigger. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for hunting or sporting use in an urban or rural environment.
description: A long, bolt-action shotgun with a dark metal barrel and a smooth, brown wooden full stock. Features a rounded trigger guard and a simple front sight.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, long barrel, and bolt handle.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the stock and receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metallic receiver, and the length of the barrel.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view showing the underside of the stock and barrel, with the trigger guard and bolt handle visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, long barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized metallic guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
